mediawikiperfmon-desc: Displays server performance and health metrics.
mediawikiperfmon-db-desc: Real-time metrics from the database layer.
mediawikiperfmon-slow-queries-denied: Permission Denied: To display the slow queries list, your database user requires SELECT privilege on the 'mysql.slow_log' table. Run this command as root in MySQL:
mediawikiperfmon-slow-queries-error: An error occurred while fetching slow queries.
mediawikiperfmon-slow-queries-empty: No slow queries logged or slow query logging is disabled.
